name: Zucchini Crispies
recipeInstructions:
1. Place zucchini slices on a baking sheet coated with cooking spray.
2. In a bowl, combine mayonnaise, onion, mustard, marjoram, and dried thyme; stir well.
3. Spread 1/2 tablespoon of the mayo mixture over each zucchini slice.
4. In another bowl, combine breadcrumbs, paprika, and melted oleo; stir well.
5. Sprinkle the breadcrumb mixture evenly over the zucchini slices.
6. Bake at 450°F for 5 minutes, or until the breadcrumbs are browned.
7. Serve warm. (Fat 0.9, Cholesterol 0.)
